params.name: Nefertiti Bust
params.source:
* Expert Scrolls (7.6%), Fragment Crafting (31.2%), Lottery Machine (0.66%), Wishing (2.8%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On Aug 1, 1912, the archaeologist Ludwig Borchardt dug up an ancient Egyptian statue.

Nefertiti was the queen of Pharaoh Akhenaten. The statue is so beautiful that it looks like an artifact from the future. It is said that she is the most ravishing woman in Egypt's history. She has appeared in many temples and murals, which speaks of her importance, so it is baffling that she was absent in the historical records of ancient Egypt.

[Basic Info]

Era: 18th Dynasty of Ancient Egypt

Type: Limeston …
